form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 3rd of 15 at Doncaster on March 28 over 2000m, 2.25 len behind Mao Shang Wong carrying 61kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Nottingham on April 29 over 2800m, 7 len behind Cock And Bull carrying 59kg at $3.30. Fitter and worth following up.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last outing ran last of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 25 over 2400m, 10 len behind Constitution Hill with 59kg at $17. form.formComment: Returns from a 61-day let-up. At the latest run settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 11 over 2200m, 6 len behind Caramay with 60kg at $51. The run before that ran last of 9 at Lingfield All Weather on January 29 over 2000m, 11 len behind King's Hand with 61kg at $26. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming ran on from midfield and won by a nose at Lingfield All Weather February 14 over 2400m defeating Imperial Decision carrying 65.5kg at $26. Second run from a spell 3rd of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 20 over 2400m, 3 len behind Made All with 60kg at $17. Genuine chance.
